title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Doubtnut Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Doubtnut Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Doubtnut Advisory Limited family as a Curriculum Developer in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Doubtnut Advisory Limited:
Doubtnut Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Doubtnut Advisory Limited!
